resources.string: This app shows a small floating +/- button on your screen to control media volume. Drag it anywhere. It keeps running even after you close this app or the screen turns off.
Overlay permission: NOT granted (tap the button above)
Battery optimization: already disabled for this app
Battery optimization: ON — tap the button above so the phone does not kill the button

On Oppo/ColorOS, also enable \"Auto-start\" / \"Allow background running\" for this app on the screen that opens — this is the setting that most affects whether the button survives after you close the app.
Tap to open settings. Turn off the switch in the app to hide the button.
